input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.8.8.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.8.8.5
            TITLE: the impact attenuator test is valid for only one competition year

            rule F.8.8.5: The Impact Attenuator Test is valid for only one Competition Year
F.8.8.5 The Impact Attenuator Test is valid for only one Competition Year

final_answer: The Impact Attenuator Test is valid for only one Competition Year
